news: WASHINGTON (Reuters) — The head of a conservative Republican faction in the U.S. Congress said on Sunday that budget restraint would be necessary in 2018. Lawmakers are preparing for federal budget discussions involving military spending, immigration policy, and social programs. The debate includes funding for education, research, infrastructure, and healthcare.

Content (shortened):
The article criticizes Donald Trump for his New Year tweet, portraying it emotionally and with strong opinion-based language. It includes reactions from social media users and presents exaggerated sentiment.
